'''Gundruk''' was a female [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] of the [[Bolgoink clan]] from [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]]. She was one of the elder daughters of the clan matron [[Kufbrug]] and held the [[Nudskutch]] region of the Bolgoink territory.<ref name="Slushtime">{{JournalCite|14|Murder in Slushtime}}</ref>

Gundruk was darker, smaller and less "gweek" ([[Gamorrese]] word translated as "strong") than her mother. She was jealous of Kufbrug's power and aimed to remove her and her husband, [[Vrokk]], from the clan leadership.<ref name="Slushtime" />
